sentences.target: Je prends mon char ce matin.

translations.fr: Je prends mon char ce matin.
translations.en: I'm taking my car this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana iré en mi coche.
translations.de: Ich fahre heute Morgen mit meinem Auto.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침에 내 차를 탈 거예요.
translations.ru: Я поеду сегодня утром на своей машине.
translations.pt: Hoje de manhã vou no meu carro.
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi lái xe của mình.
translations.nl: Vanmorgen rijd ik in mijn auto.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вранці я поїду на своїй машині.
translations.hu: Ma reggel a saját autómmal megyek.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मैं अपनी कार से जाऊँगा.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί θα πάω με το αυτοκίνητό μου.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig kjører jeg bilen min.
translations.id: Pagi ini saya mengemudikan mobil saya.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen tar jag min bil.
translations.ro: În dimineața asta merg cu mașina mea.
translations.da: Her til morgen tager jeg min bil.
translations.ja: 今朝は自分の車で行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, agreeing with the subject “Je”.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular, modifying “char”.
Common noun. In Quebec French, “char” commonly means “car”; in European French it more often refers to a “tank” or a (festival) “float”. Here, with “prendre mon char”, the meaning is ‘car’.
Demonstrative determiner used in the temporal expression “ce matin”.
Common noun indicating time; head of the noun phrase “ce matin”.

sentences.target: Ton char bloque l'entrée du garage.

translations.fr: Ton char bloque l'entrée du garage.
translations.en: Your car is blocking the garage entrance.
translations.es: Tu coche está bloqueando la entrada del garaje.
translations.it: La tua macchina sta bloccando l'ingresso del garage.
translations.ko: 네 차가 차고 입구를 막고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的车把车库入口堵住了。
translations.yue: 你架車擋住咗車房入口。
translations.ru: Твоя машина перекрывает въезд в гараж.
translations.pt: O seu carro está bloqueando a entrada da garagem.
translations.he: המכונית שלך חוסמת את כניסת המוסך.
translations.vi: Xe của bạn đang chặn lối vào gara.
translations.nl: Je auto blokkeert de inrit van de garage.
translations.uk: Твій автомобіль блокує в'їзд до гаража.
translations.hu: Az autód elállja a garázs bejáratát.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी कार गैराज के प्रवेश द्वार को रोक रही है.
translations.pl: Twój samochód blokuje wjazd do garażu.
translations.el: Το αυτοκίνητό σου φράζει την είσοδο του γκαράζ.
translations.nb: Bilen din blokkerer innkjøringen til garasjen.
translations.sv: Din bil blockerar infarten till garaget.
translations.ro: Mașina ta blochează intrarea în garaj.
translations.cs: Tvoje auto blokuje vjezd do garáže.
translations.da: Din bil blokerer indkørslen til garagen.
translations.ja: あなたの車がガレージの入口をふさいдеいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular, modifying “char”.
Common noun; here contextually ‘car’ (Quebec usage).
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Noun head with elided definite article l’ (from la before vowel). The surface keeps the clitic; it functions as the direct object of “bloque”.
Contraction of the preposition “de” + definite article “le”; introduces the complement “du garage” (not partitive here).
Common noun; object of the preposition “de” (via the contraction “du”).

sentences.target: Le char passe devant la mairie.

translations.fr: Le char passe devant la mairie.
translations.en: The parade float passes in front of the town hall.
translations.es: La carroza pasa frente al ayuntamiento.
translations.de: Der Festwagen fährt am Rathaus vorbei.
translations.it: Il carro allegorico passa davanti al municipio.
translations.yue: 花車喺市政廳前面駛過。
translations.pt: O carro alegórico passa em frente à câmara municipal.
translations.he: המשאית המקושטת עוברת מול בניין העירייה.
translations.tr: Karnaval arabası belediye binasının önünden geçiyor.
translations.vi: Xe hoa diễu hành đi ngang qua tòa thị chính.
translations.ar: العربة الاحتفالية تمر أمام مبنى البلدية.
translations.nl: De praalwagen rijdt langs het stadhuis.
translations.hu: A díszkocsi elhalad a városháza előtt.
translations.hi: झांकी नगर भवन के सामने से गुजरती है.
translations.el: Το άρμα της παρέλασης περνά μπροστά από το δημαρχείο.
translations.id: Kendaraan hias melintas di depan balai kota.
translations.ro: Carul alegoric trece prin fața primăriei.
translations.ja: 山車が市庁舎の前を通り過ぎる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing “char”.
Common noun; in standard European French often denotes a “tank” or a parade “float”. Without regional context, “tank” is a likely reading here.
Intransitive/main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular (‘to pass/go by’).
Preposition introducing the nominal complement “la mairie”.
Definite article, feminine singular.
Common noun; object of the preposition “devant”.

sentences.target: Ils louent un char pour le week-end.
sentences.reading: /il lu œ̃ ʃaʁ puʁ lə wikɛnd/

translations.fr: Ils louent un char pour le week-end.
translations.ipa: /il lu œ̃ ʃaʁ puʁ lə wikɛnd/
translations.en: They are renting a car for the weekend.
translations.de: Sie mieten für das Wochenende ein Auto.
translations.it: Noleggiano un'auto per il fine settimana.
translations.ko: 그들은 주말에 쓸 차를 빌릴 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在为周末租一辆车。
translations.yue: 佢哋為咗個週末租架車。
translations.pt: Eles vão alugar um carro para o fim de semana.
translations.tr: Hafta sonu için bir araba kiralıyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ đang thuê một chiếc xe cho cuối tuần.
translations.ar: إنهم يستأجرون سيارة لعطلة نهاية الأسبوع.
translations.nl: Ze huren een auto voor het weekend.
translations.hi: वे सप्ताहांत के लिए एक कार किराए पर ले रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ενοικιάζουν ένα αυτοκίνητο για το σαββατοκύριακο.
translations.nb: De leier en bil til helgen.
translations.id: Mereka menyewa mobil untuk akhir pekan.
translations.sv: De hyr en bil till helgen.
translations.da: De lejer en bil til weekenden.
translations.ja: 彼らは週末に車を借りている.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural.
Indefinite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; here naturally understood as ‘car’ (Quebec usage), given the verb “louer” and the time frame.
Preposition expressing purpose/time span of the rental.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing “week-end”.
Borrowed common noun (compound with hyphen), head of the prepositional object of “pour”.

Ils louent un char pour le week-end.
